claim_boundary: Phase 7 registration only. This does not claim production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, agreement detection, corroboration, alert readiness, autonomous action, or truth resolution.
phase7_goal: Create human-review packet records that preserve source provenance, category, source-type diversity, uncertainty labels, claim-safety labels, and review questions for each inspection-ready pair.
purpose: Move from inspection-ready candidate pairs to a bounded human-review packet scaffold without making agreement, contradiction, corroboration, truth, or alert claims.
required_gates: Gate 1: load Phase 6 inspection-ready pairs only
Gate 2: preserve both source records and provenance
Gate 7: no contradiction detection, agreement detection, corroboration, content validation, alerts, autonomous action, or truth resolution
